description: Migrate mysql_* connector to native PDO through the abstract DB class
Dev-server config outside the install folder (~/config/congruency.json) + one-command start
Update README files for config-as-data + PDO + external config
Auto-stamp the GPL short-notice header on new code (automatic)

Project ticket tracker: append-only ledger, REST + human view, auto IDs, status-tracked
Port the ticket tracker into jazz
DB store + signals table + dead-man's switch (tracker/store.py) — migrate ledger->db, reconcile, notify

note: signals MCP built (~/.MCP/signals-mcp), registered in the gate, documented in tracker/SIGNALS.md

description: One-command installer so the repo signals-mcp server stays in sync with ~/.MCP (no drift)

Wire congruency's tag/form engine to render the tracker DB: a <<<TicketList>>> Tag_Interface class (invocators/tags/dev/, modeled on BugReport.php) that reads project.db/the ledger and renders the ticket table; a validated ticket-submission form via Path A (forms rows: type RadioSelect + description TextBox + FCE->?page=ticketDone; a TicketLogger handler tag modeled on OrdererTag; a TicketDAO copy of OrderDAO writing a tickets table with an in_array allowlist check); page Documents ?page=tickets/ticketDone in the dev seed. Dogfoods the CMS + is the dead-code-audit vehicle (#6).
